issues.title: Enemy dealt 15 damage (94% of 16 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: At turn seq 67, floor 1 encounter 0, enemy dealt 15 damage when player had 16 HP. This is 94% of player's HP, exceeding the 50% threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 15 damage (94% of player's 16 HP)

issues.suggestedFix: Review enemy damage scaling; consider capping single-hit damage relative to player max HP

issues.title: Enemy dealt 19 damage (1900% of 1 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: At turn seq 71, floor 1 encounter 0, enemy dealt 19 damage when player had 1 HP. This is 1900% of player's HP, exceeding the 50% threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 19 damage (1900% of player's 1 HP)

issues.suggestedFix: Review enemy damage scaling; consider capping single-hit damage relative to player max HP

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 1 (early death)
issues.description: beginner profile was defeated on floor 1 with 54.90196078431373% accuracy. Final encounter against crystal_golem (common), dealt 71 but took 123 damage. Early deaths discourage new players.
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce floor 1 enemy damage or HP significantly; new players should rarely die on floor 1

issues.title: Unfun moment: HP dropped from 80 (100%) to 0 (0%) in F1E0
issues.description: Player HP dropped from 80 to 0 (123 damage taken) in a single encounter against crystal_golem (common) on floor 1. This kind of dramatic swing feels punishing and unfun.
issues.suggestedFix: Add a damage cap per encounter or emergency shield mechanic when HP drops below threshold
